ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust_size_in" TEXT /* Bust size in inches */,
  "bust_size_cm" TEXT /* Bust size in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist size in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist size in centimeters */,
  "hip_size_in" TEXT /* Hip size in inches */,
  "hip_size_cm" TEXT /* Hip size in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_in" TEXT /* Shoulder width in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam length in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the size chart is for */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size for the size chart */,
  "hips_size" TEXT /* Hip size for the size chart */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width for the size chart */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length for the size chart */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length for the size chart */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product is available in */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specific size in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was added to the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust_in" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_in" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_in" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_in" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "size_recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the size recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the brand is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
